UCS-66  IMPACT TEST EXEMPTION CURVES. (a) Materials assigned to Curves A, B, C, or D in this paragraph are exempt from impact testing when the minimum design metal temperature (MDMT) is at or above the exemption temperature for the governing nominal thickness. (b) The MDMT shall be determined from the design conditions in accordance with UG-20. See also UG-22 for load considerations. (c) When the MDMT is below the exemption temperature, impact testing shall be as required by UCS-56. Refer to UG-84 for acceptance criteria. Except as permitted by UCS-67, no further MDMT reduction is allowed. For guidance on test methods, see UCS-68. Subject to the material group, UG-80 governs material requirements. See also UCS-23 for stress values.
